findings.description: Loss of columnar layout for schedule items.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, schedule items are arranged with the time on the left, the topic in the center, and the presenter right-aligned. The HTML flattens this structure, placing the presenter's name inline immediately after the topic title.

findings.description: Loss of center alignment for the document header.
findings.evidence: The meeting details at the top of the page are center-aligned in the PDF but are left-aligned in the HTML conversion.
